nodes.title: 🅛🅣🅧 Gemma API Text Encode - NEGATIVE
widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly
Do explore various samplers and cfg values (although we advise them to be kept close to 1)

Make sure to adjust the number of tiles and overlap to fit your hardware.
(fewer tiles will result in faster execution, but will require more memory)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A traditional Japanese tea ceremony takes place in a tatami room as a host carefully prepares matcha. Soft traditional koto music plays in the background, adding to the serene atmosphere. The bamboo whisk taps rhythmically against the ceramic bowl while water simmers in an iron kettle. Guests kneel in formal seiza position, watching in respectful silence. The host bows and presents the tea bowl, turning it precisely before offering it to the first guest with soft-spoken words.

groups.title: Set prompts     -> use API Text Encode for more memory efficient run
